learning_objectives: Dunyo davlatlari nomlarini bilish va aytilishini o'rganish (Brazil, China, Colombia, France, Italy, Mexico, Russia, Spain, the UK, the US)
"Be from" strukturasini ishlatib, qayerdan ekanlikni ifodalash va so'rash (Where are you from? I'm from...)
"Was/were" fe'llaridan foydalanib, tug'ilgan sana va joy haqida gaplashish (When/Where were you born?)

key_concepts.definition: Braziliya, Xitoy, Kolumbiya, Frantsiya, Italiya, Meksika, Rossiya, Ispaniya, Birlashgan Qirollik, AQSh
...dan bo'lish (I'm from Russia, He's from Brazil, We're from France)
O'tgan zamonda bo'lganlikni ifodalaydi. I/he/she was, you/we/they were
Tug'ilgan joy (in the United Kingdom, in Spain)

worked_examples.solution: No, he isn't. He's from Russia.

exercises.question: Where are Jules and Denis from?
Which country has a yellow, blue, and red flag?
Where are you from? (Ask and answer)

summary: Bu darsda o'quvchilar dunyo davlatlari bilan tanishib, ular haqida so'zlashadi. "Where are you from?" bilan o'z kelish joylari va "When/Where were you born?" bilan tug'ilgan sana/joylari haqida ma'lumot berishni o'rganadilar. Was/were fe'llari va ordinal sonlar bilan ishlash mashq qilinadi.
